name: mockstream-desktop
description: Electron desktop client for the Mock Stream exam platform (Windows + macOS).

scripts.dist:preview: npm run runner:preview && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.preview.yml
scripts.release:preview: npm run dist:preview && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://mockstream-desktop-preview-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=MockStreamPreview-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
scripts.dist:bek: npm run runner:bek && cross-env FLAVOR=bek electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bek.yml
scripts.release:bek: npm run dist:bek && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://bekzods-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=Bekzods-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
scripts.dist:record: npm run runner:record && cross-env FLAVOR=record electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.record.yml
scripts.release:record: npm run dist:record && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://multilevelrecord-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=MultilevelRecord-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
scripts.dist:niners: npm run runner:niners && cross-env FLAVOR=niners electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.niners.yml
scripts.release:niners: npm run dist:niners && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://niners-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=NinersAcademy-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
scripts.dist:global: npm run runner:global && cross-env FLAVOR=global electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.global.yml
scripts.release:global: npm run dist:global && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://global-education-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=GlobalEducation-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
scripts.dist:achievers: npm run runner:achievers && cross-env FLAVOR=achievers electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.achievers.yml
scripts.release:achievers: npm run dist:achievers && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://achievers-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=AchieversAcademy-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
scripts.dist:muzaffars: npm run runner:muzaffars && cross-env FLAVOR=muzaffars electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.muzaffars.yml
scripts.release:muzaffars: npm run dist:muzaffars && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://muzaffars-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=MuzaffarsEnglish-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
